testcase.name: test_response_is_clean_json

failure.message:
AssertionError: Response contains 'clone' error assert 'clone' not in '{"pages":[{...ner":true}]}'
'clone' is contained here: {"pages":[{"page_id":"mpage_ae3497f388cf","owner_id":"user_ae42559c91e9","page_type":"store","name":"test store","slug":"test-store","description":"my test store","category":"","cover_image":"","logo_image":"","theme_color":"#10b981","settings":{"order_types":[],"accepts_cash":true,"accepts_card":true,"show_referral_link":true,"enable_reviews":true,"enable_ratings":true},"locations":[],"is_published":true,"is_verified":false,"subscriber_count":2,"total_views":0,"total_orders":0,"total_revenue":0.0,"rating_average":0.0,"rating_count":0,"referral_code":"9bf2b9ee","...
...Full output truncated (2 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_member_pages_creation.py:379: in test_response_is_clean_json assert "clone" not in text, "Response contains 'clone' error" E AssertionError: Response contains 'clone' error E assert 'clone' not in '{"pages":[{...ner":true}]}' E E 'clone' is contained here: E {"pages":[{"page_id":"mpage_ae3497f388cf","owner_id":"user_ae42559c91e9","page_type":"store","name":"test store","slug":"test-store","description":"my test store","category":"","cover_image":"","logo_image":"","theme_color":"#10b981","settings":{"order_types":[],"accepts_cash":true,"accepts_card":true,"show_referral_link":true,"enable_reviews":true,"enable_ratings":true},"locations":[],"is_published":true,"is_verified":false,"subscriber_count":2,"total_views":0,"total_orders":0,"total_revenue":0.0,"rating_average":0.0,"rating_count":0,"referral_code":"9bf2b9ee","...
